name: desafio-banco-carrefour
description: Mobile test automation for WebdriverIO native-demo-app - Desafio Banco Carrefour

scripts.test:android: rm -rf allure-results allure-report && wdio run wdio.android.conf.js; npm run allure:report
scripts.test:android:login: rm -rf allure-results allure-report && wdio run wdio.android.conf.js --spec tests/specs/01_login.spec.js; npm run allure:report
scripts.test:android:signup: rm -rf allure-results allure-report && wdio run wdio.android.conf.js --spec tests/specs/02_signup.spec.js; npm run allure:report
scripts.test:android:navigation: rm -rf allure-results allure-report && wdio run wdio.android.conf.js --spec tests/specs/03_navigation.spec.js; npm run allure:report
scripts.test:android:form: rm -rf allure-results allure-report && wdio run wdio.android.conf.js --spec tests/specs/04_form.spec.js; npm run allure:report
scripts.allure:generate: rm -rf allure-report && allure generate allure-results -o allure-report
scripts.allure:report: npm run allure:generate && npm run allure:open
